2262670.name: PH0B0S Limited Edition: SN0WCOVER
2262670.description:
SN0W COVERS THE IMMACULATE WORLD, MAKING EVERYTHING FEEL NEW AGAIN. WEAPON AND LEVELS HAVE BEEN REDESIGNED TO SPORT A FROSTY THEME.
FOR A [LIMITED TIME ONLY], SPEND SOME TIME IN THIS WINTER WONDERLAND PACK AND LET YOURSELF FEEL FRESH.

Key features:
  • Levels redesigned and redecorated with an icy, shiny look.
  • Weapon aesthetic overhauled to support a more high quality and polished look.
  • This collectible edition will only be sold for this window of time.
